actions.name: Ray of Frost
actions.description: Ranged spell attack. 2d8 cold damage, target's speed reduced by 10 ft.

attack.name: Ray of Frost
extra_effects: Target's speed reduced by 10 feet until start of your next turn

actions.name: Magic Missile
actions.description: Three darts of magical force. Each dart hits automatically for 1d4+1 force damage.

actions.name: Scorching Ray
actions.description: Three rays of fire. Make a ranged spell attack for each ray. 2d6 fire damage per ray.

actions.name: Thunderwave
actions.description: 15-ft cube originating from you. CON save DC 15 or 2d8 thunder damage and pushed 10 ft away. Half damage on save, no push.

actions.name: Fireball
actions.description: 20-foot radius explosion. Dex save or 8d6 fire damage (half on save).

actions.name: Hold Person
actions.description: One humanoid within range must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom save or be paralyzed. Target repeats save at end of each turn.

actions.name: Web
actions.description: One creature must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity save or be restrained. Target repeats save at end of each turn. Concentration.

bonus_actions.name: Misty Step
bonus_actions.description: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

reactions.name: Shield
reactions.description: +5 AC until start of next turn, including against triggering attack.

reactions.name: Counterspell
reactions.description: Attempt to interrupt a creature casting a spell.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day during short rest, recover spell slots up to half wizard level (rounded up)

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.description: Halved time and gold to copy evocation spells

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.description: Create pockets of safety in evocation spells for allies

features.name: Fey Ancestry
features.description: Advantage on saves against being charmed, immune to magical sleep

features.name: Trance
features.description: 4 hours of meditation instead of 8 hours sleep
